name: 分红狗头 (Dividend Dog Head)
description: 分红狗头 (Dividend Dog Head) is the first high-yield dividend meme token launched on BNB Chain via the FLap Butterfly platform. Built for holders who believe in earning while they HODL, Dividend Dog Head automatically distributes WBNB rewards to its community with every transaction. The tokenomics feature a 3% transaction fee—1.5% flows directly back to holders as WBNB dividends, while 1.5% is permanently burned, creating consistent deflationary pressure. Born from the legendary GOUT founding team, this project combines proven DeFi mechanics with viral meme culture. With an aggressive marketing push, passionate community, and integration into the broader GOUTSWAP ecosystem, Dividend Dog Head aims to become the leading dividend-powered meme token on BSC. Hold the doge, earn the dividends!
